name: USS Henry A. Wiley (DM 29)
events: 9 Dec 1944 USS Henry A. Wiley arrived at Pearl Harbor.
16 Feb 1945 USS Henry A. Wiley arrived in the Iwo Jima area to participate in the landings on that island.
23 Mar 1945 USS Henry A. Wiley arrived in the Okinawa area to participate in the Okinawa campaign.
